title: Synthetic Control with Differencing (Rincon & Song 2026) vs mlsynth SCD (Arizona LAWA, CPS microdata)
paper: Rincon & Song (2026), 'Synthetic Control with Differencing' (arXiv:2510.26106); repeated-cross-section inference from Canen & Song (2025)
reference_impl: the SCD point estimator, corrected RC pointwise variance, and in_C confidence-set membership, reproduced from scratch (upstream ratzanyelrincon/scd is GPL) on public-domain CPS microdata
